subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who attained unto the lights of the Bayán when the All-Merciful appeared and believed in God, the Protector, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار البیان اذ اتی الرحمن و آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
